findings.title: scope.ts / runtime-capability-gate.ts の consumer 主張が不正確
findings.rationale: 「listChangedFiles は scope.ts / runtime-capability-gate.ts も consume する」と記載されているが、両ファイルとも pure module で listChangedFiles を直接呼ばない。実際の呼び出し元は src/core/step/scope-check.ts。blast radius の懸念自体は正しく、実装判断（invalidation site に filter を置く）は不変。

observations.title: headSha capture が roundOwnsGitEffects の前提で de-facto に reviewed source revision
observations.rationale: line 185-189 のコメントが明示するとおり、roundOwnsGitEffects=true によりメンバーは commit しないため、headSha は findings commit 前の source revision に等しい。approvedAtCommit の意味 (a) は de-facto 既に成立しており、contract test で固定する本 request のアプローチは適切。

toolResult.reason:
Wrote design.md, spec.md, and tasks.md under specrunner/changes/round-invalidation-source-scoped/ on branch change/round-invalidation-source-scoped-b69f41a6.

Design summary:
- D1: Fix approvedAtCommit's meaning as "reviewed source revision" via a contract test — the value is the HEAD captured after member execution but before commitRoundArtifacts (findings commit), which is de-facto already the case under roundOwnsGitEffects. No implementation change to the capture site; a stateful-fake contract test pins the ordering so a regression to meaning (b) fails.
- D2: Add a pure filter excludeChangeFolderPaths(files) in src/core/pipeline/round-git-scope.ts that drops paths under changesDirRel() (= specrunner/changes/), and apply it at the invalidation site in parallel-review-round.ts between listChangedFiles and computeInvalidations. listChangedFiles seam and computeInvalidations logic are unchanged, so scope.ts / runtime-capability-gate.ts consumers are unaffected. Reuses the readSourceRevision :(exclude)specrunner/changes/ principle; distinct from pipelineManagedPaths (3-file subset) because findings files must also be excluded.
- D3: computeInvalidations / evaluateActivation / always-activate behavior unchanged → true source changes (src/**) still invalidate (req 3); always-activate (activationPaths undefined) still always invalidates even when source-scoped touched is empty (req 4, behavior preserved); broad-activation reviewers no longer self-invalidate on findings-only changes (req 2, main goal).

Tasks: T-01 pure filter + unit test (boundary: same-prefix sibling retained), T-02 wire filter at invalidation site, T-03 approvedAtCommit contract test, T-04 invalidation behavior tests (req 2/3/4), T-05 verification (typecheck+test green, listChangedFiles seam & scope-check tests unchanged, changes limited to round-git-scope.ts + parallel-review-round.ts + their tests). No architecture/ or ADR edits (contract/behavior only, per ADR-20260713 teeth/contract split).

observations.title: T-03 の fake step に `writes()` 実装が必要
observations.rationale: commitRoundArtifacts を呼ばせるには toStage.length > 0 が必要で、fake step に writes() が非空を返す実装が必要。既存の makeStep ヘルパーは writes を定義していない。tasks.md に意図は明記されているが、実装時に見落とすと commitRoundArtifacts が呼ばれず契約テストとして成立しない。

observations.title: captureHeadSha は同ファイル内で 2 回呼ばれる
observations.rationale: L108（invalidation の currentHeadSha）と L187–189（approvedAtCommit の headSha）の 2 箇所。D1 contract test の stateful fake は両呼び出しで source-sha を返せば足りる（どちらも commitRoundArtifacts より前）。アサーション対象は L187 の呼び出し結果のみ。

message: spec-review iteration 1 completed with verdict: approved

toolResult.reason: All tasks implemented and verified green (6945 tests pass, typecheck clean). Changes: (1) `excludeChangeFolderPaths` pure function added to `round-git-scope.ts` with `changesDirRel()` import; (2) `parallel-review-round.ts` invalidation loop now applies `excludeChangeFolderPaths(touched)` → `sourceTouched` before passing to `computeInvalidations` — `listChangedFiles` seam unchanged; (3) `round-git-scope.test.ts` extended with 15 new tests covering exclusion, retention, boundary, and edge cases; (4) new `parallel-review-round-invalidation.test.ts` with T-03 contract test (approvedAtCommit = source revision before commitRoundArtifacts) and T-04 behavior tests (Req 2a/2b: broad-activation not re-run on change-folder-only diff; Req 3: source path triggers invalidation; Req 4: always-activate always re-runs).

message: verification iteration 1 completed with verdict: passed
